metadata.description: Batch 33 — additional Oxford 5000 words 201-300; continuing IDs after Batch 32

words.definitionEn: a hard hit or an unfortunate event
words.example: The impact delivered a heavy blow to the guard.

words.definitionEn: to speak proudly about achievements
words.example: The new camera boasts high-speed processing.

words.definitionEn: confident and willing to take risks
words.example: The team proposed a bold automation plan.

words.definitionEn: an attack involving explosive bombs
words.definitionTh: การทิ้งระเบิด
words.example: The report uses “bombing” in context.

words.definitionEn: an extra payment or benefit
words.example: The supplier included an extended warranty as a bonus.

words.definitionEn: an arrangement made in advance
words.example: Confirm the training-room booking.

words.definitionEn: a period of rapid growth or a deep sound
words.definitionTh: การเติบโตอย่างรวดเร็ว
words.example: The industry experienced a technology boom.

words.definitionEn: to increase, improve, or encourage
words.definitionTh: เพิ่ม / กระตุ้น
words.example: Improved lighting can boost detection accuracy.

words.definitionEn: to move back after hitting a surface
words.example: The signal may bounce off the metal surface.

words.definitionEn: certain or required to happen
words.definitionTh: ผูกพัน / มุ่งหน้า
words.example: The project is bound to face some risk.

words.definitionEn: a line marking the limit of an area
words.example: Keep equipment inside the safety boundary.

words.definitionEn: to bend the head or body as a sign of respect
words.example: The report uses “bow1” in context.

words.definitionEn: a failure to follow a rule or agreement
words.example: Report any security breach immediately.

words.definitionEn: a failure of a machine, system, or relationship
words.definitionTh: การเสีย / การพัง
words.example: The machine breakdown stopped production.

words.definitionEn: an important discovery or major advance
words.definitionTh: ความก้าวหน้าครั้งใหญ่
words.example: The trial produced a major technical breakthrough.

words.definitionEn: to produce animals or plants; a type produced
words.definitionTh: เพาะพันธุ์ / สายพันธุ์
words.example: Heat and moisture can breed bacteria.

words.definitionEn: a rectangular block used for building
words.example: The bracket is fixed to a brick wall.

words.definitionEn: for a short time or in few words
words.example: Briefly summarize the test result.

words.definitionEn: a high-speed internet connection
words.definitionTh: อินเทอร์เน็ตความเร็วสูง
words.example: The site requires a stable broadband connection.

words.definitionEn: a person or company that transmits programs
words.definitionTh: ผู้แพร่ภาพ
words.example: The broadcaster transmitted the event live.

words.definitionEn: in a general or wide-ranging way
words.example: The results are broadly consistent.

words.definitionEn: software used to view websites
words.definitionTh: เบราว์เซอร์
words.example: Open the dashboard in a web browser.

words.definitionEn: extremely cruel or harsh
words.example: The equipment endured brutal operating conditions.

words.definitionEn: a dollar or a male animal
words.definitionTh: ดอลลาร์ / ตัวผู้
words.example: The report uses “buck” in context.

words.definitionEn: an informal word for a friend
words.example: The report uses “buddy” in context.

words.definitionEn: something that reduces shock or separates processes
words.definitionTh: ตัวกันชน / บัฟเฟอร์
words.example: Add a buffer to absorb vibration.

words.definitionEn: an error in software or a small insect
words.definitionTh: ข้อบกพร่อง
words.example: The developer fixed a software bug.

words.definitionEn: a large quantity or main mass
words.example: The bulk of the defects occurred at start-up.

words.definitionEn: a heavy responsibility or difficulty
words.example: Automation reduces the operator’s inspection burden.

words.definitionEn: a complex system of official rules and departments
words.definitionTh: ระบบราชการ
words.example: Excessive bureaucracy delayed approval.

words.definitionEn: the act or ceremony of placing a body in the ground
words.example: The report uses “burial” in context.

words.definitionEn: to break open or happen suddenly
words.definitionTh: แตกออกอย่างฉับพลัน
words.example: The pipe may burst under excessive pressure.

words.definitionEn: a small simple house or enclosed room
words.definitionTh: กระท่อม / ห้องโดยสาร
words.example: The operator entered the control cabin.

words.definitionEn: a storage unit or a group of senior advisers
words.definitionTh: ตู้ / คณะรัฐมนตรี
words.example: Install the controller inside the cabinet.

words.definitionEn: the process of using numbers to find an answer
words.example: Verify the storage calculation.

words.definitionEn: an artificial waterway
words.example: The material was transported by canal.

words.definitionEn: a stick of wax with a wick that gives light
words.example: A candle produced insufficient inspection light.

words.definitionEn: strong cloth used for painting or equipment covers
words.example: The protective canvas covered the machine.

words.definitionEn: the ability or potential to do something
words.definitionTh: ความสามารถ
words.example: The camera has strong low-light capability.

words.definitionEn: an economic system based on private ownership
words.example: The report uses “capitalism” in context.

words.definitionEn: a supporter of capitalism or relating to it
words.definitionTh: นายทุน / แบบทุนนิยม
words.example: The report uses “capitalist” in context.

words.definitionEn: a chemical element present in living things and fuels
words.example: The project aims to reduce carbon emissions.

words.definitionEn: goods carried by ship, aircraft, or vehicle
words.example: Inspect the cargo before transport.

words.definitionEn: a vehicle pulled by horses or a train compartment
words.definitionTh: รถม้า / ตู้โดยสาร
words.example: The sensor is mounted on the moving carriage.

words.definitionEn: to cut a shape or design into a material
words.example: Do not carve marks into the fixture.

words.definitionEn: a place where people gamble
words.example: The report uses “casino” in context.

words.definitionEn: a large fortified building
words.example: The report uses “castle” in context.

words.definitionEn: relaxed and informal
words.definitionTh: ไม่เป็นทางการ
words.example: The meeting used a casual format.

words.definitionEn: a person injured or killed in an event
words.definitionTh: ผู้บาดเจ็บหรือเสียชีวิต
words.example: The emergency plan aims to prevent casualties.

words.definitionEn: an organized list of items
words.definitionTh: แค็ตตาล็อก
words.example: Select the part from the supplier catalog.

words.definitionEn: to provide food or services for an event
words.definitionTh: จัดหาอาหาร
words.example: The design should cater to different product sizes.

words.definitionEn: cows and similar farm animals
words.example: The farm uses sensors to monitor cattle.

words.definitionEn: care taken to avoid danger or mistakes
words.definitionTh: ความระมัดระวัง
words.example: Use caution around the moving shaft.

words.definitionEn: careful to avoid danger or mistakes
words.definitionTh: ระมัดระวัง
words.example: Take a cautious approach during commissioning.

words.definitionEn: a large natural hole in rock or earth
words.example: The survey team entered the cave.

words.definitionEn: to stop or come to an end
words.example: The line must cease operation during maintenance.

words.definitionEn: a place where dead people are buried
words.example: The report uses “cemetery” in context.

words.definitionEn: the state of being sure
words.definitionTh: ความแน่นอน
words.example: The report uses “certainty” in context.

words.definitionEn: an official document proving a fact or qualification
words.example: Verify the calibration certificate.

words.definitionEn: difficult in a way that tests ability
words.example: The reflective surface is challenging to inspect.

words.definitionEn: a room or formal governing body
words.example: Place the sample inside the test chamber.

words.definitionEn: a competition to decide the best participant
words.definitionTh: การแข่งขันชิงแชมป์
words.example: The report uses “championship” in context.

words.definitionEn: a state of complete confusion or disorder
words.definitionTh: ความโกลาหล
words.example: A clear response plan prevents chaos.

words.definitionEn: to describe the typical qualities of something
words.definitionTh: บ่งบอกลักษณะ
words.example: The test characterizes the defect pattern.

words.definitionEn: an attractive quality; to delight someone
words.example: The old design has a certain charm.

words.definitionEn: pleasant and attractive
words.example: The village is small and charming.

words.definitionEn: a formal document granting rights or defining duties
words.example: The project charter defines the scope.

words.definitionEn: to run after or try to catch
words.example: The team should not chase every minor variation.

words.definitionEn: the side of the face below the eye
words.example: The report uses “cheek” in context.

words.definitionEn: to shout support or encouragement
words.example: The team cheered after the successful trial.

words.definitionEn: a group of people singing together
words.definitionTh: คณะนักร้องประสานเสียง
words.example: The report uses “choir” in context.

words.definitionEn: to cut something into small pieces
words.example: Chop the material into smaller pieces.

words.definitionEn: continuing for a long time or recurring
words.example: The line has a chronic vibration issue.

words.definitionEn: a thick piece or a substantial part
words.definitionTh: ก้อน / ส่วนใหญ่
words.example: Process the dataset in manageable chunks.

words.definitionEn: a complete path through which electricity flows
words.example: Check the electrical circuit before start-up.

words.definitionEn: to move continuously through a system
words.example: The pump circulates coolant through the system.

words.definitionEn: the movement of something through a system
words.definitionTh: การหมุนเวียน
words.example: Poor air circulation raises cabinet temperature.

words.definitionEn: the legal status and duties of being a citizen
words.definitionTh: ความเป็นพลเมือง
words.example: The report uses “citizenship” in context.

words.definitionEn: relating to a city or citizenship
words.definitionTh: เกี่ยวกับพลเมือง
words.example: The report uses “civic” in context.

words.definitionEn: a person not serving in the armed forces
words.example: The report uses “civilian” in context.

words.definitionEn: an advanced organized human society
words.example: The report uses “civilization” in context.

words.definitionEn: to make something easier to understand
words.example: Clarify the acceptance criteria before testing.

words.definitionEn: the quality of being clear
words.definitionTh: ความชัดเจน
words.example: Increase the image clarity.

words.definitionEn: a serious disagreement or collision
words.example: The maintenance schedule may clash with production.

words.definitionEn: the act of arranging things into groups
words.example: The model performs defect classification.

words.definitionEn: to arrange things into groups
words.example: Classify each defect by root cause.

words.definitionEn: a high steep rock face
words.example: The road follows the edge of a cliff.

words.definitionEn: to hold tightly or stay very close
words.example: Dust may cling to the lens.

words.definitionEn: a place where medical treatment is provided
words.example: The employee visited the onsite clinic.

words.definitionEn: relating to medical examination or treatment
words.example: The device requires clinical evaluation.

words.definitionEn: a small fastening device or short media extract
words.definitionTh: คลิป / ที่หนีบ
words.example: Secure the cable with a clip.

words.definitionEn: the act of closing something permanently or temporarily
words.example: Valve closure stops the flow.

words.definitionEn: a closely grouped set of similar things
words.example: The chart shows a cluster of defects.

words.definitionEn: a temporary alliance of groups
words.example: Several organizations formed a coalition.

words.definitionEn: relating to the coast
words.example: The equipment needs protection in coastal areas.

words.definitionEn: a mixed drink or combination of substances
words.example: The solution is a cocktail of several technologies.

words.definitionEn: relating to thinking and mental processes
words.definitionTh: เกี่ยวกับการคิดรู้
words.example: The interface should reduce cognitive load.

words.definitionEn: to happen at the same time
words.definitionTh: เกิดขึ้นพร้อมกัน
words.example: The alarm time coincided with the pressure drop.

words.definitionEn: an unexpected occurrence of similar events
words.definitionTh: ความบังเอิญ
words.example: The matching timestamps were not a coincidence.

words.definitionEn: to work together toward a shared goal
words.example: Engineering and production will collaborate on the trial.
